response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed video to identify intro talk, song performance, and outro. 2. Identified song 'お姉さま♡ラヴコール' (Oneesama ♡ Love Call) with performer Laplus Darknesss and composers Beat Mario to Maron from on-screen text. 3. Extracted complete lyrics from the video's on-screen captions as it is the most accurate source. 4. Constructed scene mapping based on timing.
response.global_summary: A video featuring VTuber Laplus Darknesss introducing her new song, "Oneesama ♡ Love Call," followed by a full music video performance, with an introductory talk and a concluding reaction.

scenes.description: Laplus Darknesss and a blond character discuss a new merchandise set and the upcoming music audition.
Laplus Darknesss performs her original song 'Oneesama ♡ Love Call', with lyrics displayed on screen.
scenes.original_artist: ビートまりおとまろん
scenes.performer_in_video: ラプラス・ダークネス
